Pr(B|A).description: Conditional probability of dog ownership given cat ownership, used directly in the total probability rule calculation.

Pr(A).description: Probability of cat ownership (event A), used in the total probability rule calculation.

Pr(B|¬A).description: Conditional probability of dog ownership given no cat ownership, derived in the background and used in the total probability rule calculation.

Pr(¬A).description: Probability of not owning a cat, complement of Pr(A), used in the total probability rule calculation.
